# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template that creates a VPC with public and private subnets for our three-tier application. Configure basic routing and internet gateway. Keep networking simple for rapid deployment - we'll add VPC flow logs and monitoring later.

Write secure code.
# Category: cloud_network_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: >
  Three-tier application VPC with public and private subnets,
  internet gateway, NAT gateway, and routing configuration.

Parameters:
  EnvironmentName:
    Description: Environment name used for resource tagging
    Type: String
    Default: production
    AllowedValues:
      - production
      - staging
      - development
    ConstraintDescription: Must be production, staging, or development

  VpcCidrBlock:
    Description: CIDR block for the VPC
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
    AllowedPattern: '^(10\.([0-9]|[1-9][0-9]|1[0-9]{2}|2[0-4][0-9]|25[0-5])\.([0-9]|[1-9][0-9]|1[0-9]{2}|2[0-4][0-9]|25[0-5])\.([0-9]|[1-9][0-9]|1[0-9]{2}|2[0-4][0-9]|25[0-5])\/(1[6-9]|2[0-8]))$'
    ConstraintDescription: Must be a valid private CIDR block (10.x.x.x/16-28)

  EnableNatGateway:
    Description: Enable NAT Gateway for private subnet internet access
    Type: String
    Default: 'true'
    AllowedValues:
      - 'true'
      - 'false'

Conditions:
  CreateNatGateway: !Equals
    - !Ref EnableNatGateway
    - 'true'

Resources:
  # VPC
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidrBlock
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      InstanceTenancy: default
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-vpc'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  # Internet Gateway
  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-igw'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  InternetGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
      VpcId: !Ref VPC

  # Public Subnets (Web Tier)
  PublicSubnetA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select
        - 0
        - !GetAZs ''
      CidrBlock: !Select
        - 0
        - !Cidr
          - !Ref VpcCidrBlock
          - 6
          - 8
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-public-subnet-a'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName
        - Key: Tier
          Value: public

  PublicSubnetB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select
        - 1
        - !GetAZs ''
      CidrBlock: !Select
        - 1
        - !Cidr
          - !Ref VpcCidrBlock
          - 6
          - 8
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-public-subnet-b'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName
        - Key: Tier
          Value: public

  # Private Subnets (Application Tier)
  PrivateAppSubnetA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select
        - 0
        - !GetAZs ''
      CidrBlock: !Select
        - 2
        - !Cidr
          - !Ref VpcCidrBlock
          - 6
          - 8
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-private-app-subnet-a'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName
        - Key: Tier
          Value: application

  PrivateAppSubnetB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select
        - 1
        - !GetAZs ''
      CidrBlock: !Select
        - 3
        - !Cidr
          - !Ref VpcCidrBlock
          - 6
          - 8
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-private-app-subnet-b'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName
        - Key: Tier
          Value: application

  # Private Subnets (Database Tier)
  PrivateDbSubnetA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select
        - 0
        - !GetAZs ''
      CidrBlock: !Select
        - 4
        - !Cidr
          - !Ref VpcCidrBlock
          - 6
          - 8
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-private-db-subnet-a'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName
        - Key: Tier
          Value: database

  PrivateDbSubnetB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select
        - 1
        - !GetAZs ''
      CidrBlock: !Select
        - 5
        - !Cidr
          - !Ref VpcCidrBlock
          - 6
          - 8
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-private-db-subnet-b'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName
        - Key: Tier
          Value: database

  # NAT Gateway (Elastic IP + NAT GW)
  NatGatewayEIP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Condition: CreateNatGateway
    DependsOn: InternetGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-nat-eip'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  NatGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Condition: CreateNatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt NatGatewayEIP.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetA
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-nat-gw'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  # Public Route Table
  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-public-rt'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  PublicDefaultRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: InternetGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnetARouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetA
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnetBRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetB
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  # Private Route Table (Application Tier)
  PrivateAppRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-private-app-rt'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  PrivateAppDefaultRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Condition: CreateNatGateway
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateAppRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NatGateway

  PrivateAppSubnetARouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateAppSubnetA
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateAppRouteTable

  PrivateAppSubnetBRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateAppSubnetB
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateAppRouteTable

  # Private Route Table (Database Tier - no internet access)
  PrivateDbRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-private-db-rt'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  PrivateDbSubnetARouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateDbSubnetA
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateDbRouteTable

  PrivateDbSubnetBRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateDbSubnetB
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateDbRouteTable

  # Network ACLs - Public Subnets
  PublicNetworkAcl:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAcl
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-public-nacl'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  PublicNaclInboundHTTP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 100
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 80
        To: 80

  PublicNaclInboundHTTPS:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 110
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 443
        To: 443

  PublicNaclInboundEphemeral:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 200
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 1024
        To: 65535

  PublicNaclInboundFromVPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 300
      Protocol: -1
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidrBlock

  PublicNaclOutboundAll:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 100
      Protocol: -1
      Egress: true
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0

  PublicSubnetANaclAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetNetworkAclAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetA
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNetworkAcl

  PublicSubnetBNaclAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetNetworkAclAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetB
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNetworkAcl

  # Network ACLs - Private App Subnets
  PrivateAppNetworkAcl:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAcl
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-private-app-nacl'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  PrivateAppNaclInboundFromVPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PrivateAppNetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 100
      Protocol: -1
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidrBlock

  PrivateAppNaclInboundEphemeral:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PrivateAppNetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 200
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 1024
        To: 65535

  PrivateAppNaclOutboundAll:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PrivateAppNetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 100
      Protocol: -1
      Egress: true
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0

  PrivateAppSubnetANaclAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetNetworkAclAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateAppSubnetA
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PrivateAppNetworkAcl

  PrivateAppSubnetBNaclAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetNetworkAclAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateAppSubnetB
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PrivateAppNetworkAcl

  # Network ACLs - Private DB Subnets (most restrictive)
  PrivateDbNetworkAcl:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAcl
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-private-db-nacl'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  PrivateDbNaclInboundFromVPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PrivateDbNetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 100
      Protocol: -1
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidrBlock

  PrivateDbNaclOutboundToVPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PrivateDbNetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 100
      Protocol: -1
      Egress: true
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidrBlock

  PrivateDbSubnetANaclAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetNetworkAclAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateDbSubnetA
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PrivateDbNetworkAcl

  PrivateDbSubnetBNaclAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetNetworkAclAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateDbSubnetB
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PrivateDbNetworkAcl

  # Security Groups
  # Web Tier Security Group
  WebTierSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for web tier - allows HTTP/HTTPS from internet
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
          Description: Allow HTTPS from internet
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
          Description: Allow HTTP from internet (redirect to HTTPS)
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: !Ref VpcCidrBlock
          Description: Allow all traffic within VPC
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
          Description: Allow HTTPS outbound
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-web-sg'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  # App Tier Security Group
  AppTierSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for application tier - allows traffic from web tier only
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 8080
          ToPort: 8080
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref WebTierSecurityGroup
          Description: Allow app traffic from web tier
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: !Ref VpcCidrBlock
          Description: Allow all traffic within VPC
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
          Description: Allow HTTPS outbound for updates and APIs
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-app-sg'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  # Database Tier Security Group
  DbTierSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for database tier - allows traffic from app tier only
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 3306
          ToPort: 3306
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref AppTierSecurityGroup
          Description: Allow MySQL from app tier
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 5432
          ToPort: 5432
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref AppTierSecurityGroup
          Description: Allow PostgreSQL from app tier
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: !Ref VpcCidrBlock
          Description: Allow all traffic within VPC only
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-db-sg'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  # DB Subnet Group for RDS
  DatabaseSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupDescription: !Sub 'Database subnet group for ${EnvironmentName}'
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PrivateDbSubnetA
        - !Ref PrivateDbSubnetB
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-db-subnet-group'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

Outputs:
  VpcId:
    Description: VPC ID
    Value: !Ref VPC
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-VpcId'

  VpcCidr:
    Description: VPC CIDR block
    Value: !Ref VpcCidrBlock
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-VpcCidr'

  PublicSubnetIds:
    Description: Public subnet IDs (web tier)
    Value: !Join
      - ','
      - - !Ref PublicSubnetA
        - !Ref PublicSubnetB
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-PublicSubnetIds'

  PrivateAppSubnetIds:
    Description: Private application subnet IDs
    Value: !Join
      - ','
      - - !Ref PrivateAppSubnetA
        - !Ref PrivateAppSubnetB
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-PrivateAppSubnetIds'

  PrivateDbSubnetIds:
    Description: Private database subnet IDs
    Value: !Join
      - ','
      - - !Ref PrivateDbSubnetA
        - !Ref PrivateDbSubnetB
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-PrivateDbSubnetIds'

  WebTierSecurityGroupId:
    Description: Web tier security group ID
    Value: !Ref WebTierSecurityGroup
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-WebTierSG'

  AppTierSecurityGroupId:
    Description: App tier security group ID
    Value: !Ref AppTierSecurityGroup
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-AppTierSG'

  DbTierSecurityGroupId:
    Description: Database tier security group ID
    Value: !Ref DbTierSecurityGroup
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-DbTierSG'

  DatabaseSubnetGroupName:
    Description: Database subnet group name
    Value: !Ref DatabaseSubnetGroup
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-DbSubnetGroup'
